title: Savory Spanish Chicken Paella
description: A comforting Spanish dish featuring chicken, lime juice, and a sweet glaze, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients like turmeric and ginger.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the turmeric, ginger, paprika, salt, and pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the rice to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the lime juice and honey to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the paella hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
